metadata.name: Organization Maturity Model
metadata.description: Complete organizational maturity model across Security, Operations, Quality, Product, and AI domains

security.name: SAST Coverage
security.description: Percentage of repositories with SAST scanning

security.name: SCA Coverage
security.description: Percentage of repositories with dependency scanning

security.name: MTTR Critical
security.description: Mean time to remediate critical findings

operational-excellence.name: Deployment Frequency
operational-excellence.description: How often code is deployed to production

quality.name: Defect Density
quality.description: Defects per thousand lines of code

quality.name: Defect Escape Rate
quality.description: Defects found in production vs total

levels.name: Reactive
levels.description: Ad-hoc security, firefighting mode, no formal processes

levels.name: Basic
levels.description: Basic security controls in place, some visibility

criteria.name: SAST Coverage
criteria.description: Percentage of repositories with SAST scanning enabled

criteria.name: SCA Coverage
criteria.description: Percentage of repositories with dependency scanning

criteria.name: Vulnerability Tracking
criteria.description: Percentage of discovered vulnerabilities logged in tracking system

criteria.name: Incident Process
criteria.description: Security incident response process is documented

enablers.name: Deploy SAST tooling
enablers.description: Install and configure static analysis security scanner

enablers.name: Deploy SCA tooling
enablers.description: Install and configure software composition analysis

enablers.name: Implement vulnerability tracking
enablers.description: Set up vulnerability tracking workflow in issue tracker

enablers.name: Document incident response process
enablers.description: Create security incident response runbook and escalation procedures

levels.name: Defined
levels.description: Integrated security with enforcement, standardized processes

enablers.name: Integrate scanning in CI/CD
enablers.description: Add SAST and SCA scanning to all CI/CD pipelines

enablers.name: Implement security gates
enablers.description: Configure CI to block merges with critical findings

enablers.name: Deploy secrets scanning
enablers.description: Implement pre-commit hooks for secrets detection

enablers.name: Deploy CSPM
enablers.description: Implement cloud security posture management

levels.name: Managed
levels.description: Real-time security with measurement, data-driven decisions

enablers.name: Deploy SIEM/SOAR
enablers.description: Implement security information and event management

enablers.name: Implement remediation SLAs
enablers.description: Define and enforce fix timelines by severity

enablers.name: Establish pentest program
enablers.description: Annual pentest schedule for tier-1 services

levels.name: Optimizing
levels.description: Proactive, automated security with continuous improvement

enablers.name: Implement auto-remediation
enablers.description: Automated patching and configuration fixes

enablers.name: Establish red team program
enablers.description: Regular adversarial testing of defenses

operational-excellence.name: Operational Excellence
operational-excellence.description: Reliability, efficiency, and delivery excellence across all value streams

levels.name: Reactive
levels.description: Ad-hoc operations, manual processes, firefighting mode

levels.name: Basic
levels.description: Basic monitoring, some CI/CD, documented processes

enablers.name: Deploy monitoring
enablers.description: Implement uptime and basic health monitoring

enablers.name: Set up CI/CD
enablers.description: Implement basic CI/CD pipelines

enablers.name: Establish on-call
enablers.description: Document on-call rotation and escalation

enablers.name: Implement incident tracking
enablers.description: Set up incident tracking workflow

levels.name: Defined
levels.description: Standardized CI/CD, SLOs defined, runbooks documented

enablers.name: Standardize CI/CD
enablers.description: Implement consistent CI/CD across all services

enablers.name: Define SLOs
enablers.description: Define SLOs for all tier-1 services

enablers.name: Create runbooks
enablers.description: Document runbooks for common incidents

levels.name: Managed
levels.description: Error budgets, DORA high performer, data-driven operations

enablers.name: Implement error budgets
enablers.description: Track and enforce error budgets for SLOs

enablers.name: Implement DORA dashboard
enablers.description: Track DORA metrics with dashboards

enablers.name: Implement auto-rollback
enablers.description: Automated rollback on deployment failures

levels.name: Optimizing
levels.description: Elite DORA performance, self-healing, proactive operations

enablers.name: Implement self-healing
enablers.description: Auto-remediation for common failure modes

enablers.name: Chaos engineering program
enablers.description: Regular chaos engineering exercises

quality.name: Quality
quality.description: Software quality, testing, and defect management maturity

levels.name: Reactive
levels.description: Ad-hoc testing, no automation, firefighting defects

levels.name: Basic
levels.description: Some unit tests, basic CI, defects tracked

enablers.name: Deploy test framework
enablers.description: Establish unit testing framework and conventions

enablers.name: Integrate tests in CI
enablers.description: Run tests automatically in CI pipeline

enablers.name: Implement defect tracking
enablers.description: Set up defect tracking workflow

levels.name: Defined
levels.description: Coverage targets, E2E tests, quality gates enforced

enablers.name: Enforce coverage targets
enablers.description: Block merges below coverage threshold

enablers.name: Implement E2E testing
enablers.description: Deploy E2E test framework and coverage

enablers.name: Eliminate flaky tests
enablers.description: Identify and fix flaky tests

levels.name: Managed
levels.description: High coverage, performance testing, defect metrics tracked

enablers.name: Implement performance testing
enablers.description: Deploy performance test framework

enablers.name: Quality metrics dashboard
enablers.description: Track defect density, escape rate, MTTR

levels.name: Optimizing
levels.description: Continuous testing, predictive quality, near-zero escapes

enablers.name: Implement canary testing
enablers.description: Automated canary deployments with quality gates

enablers.name: Predictive quality analysis
enablers.description: ML-based defect prediction

product.description: Product requirements, adoption, and customer success maturity

levels.name: Reactive
levels.description: Ad-hoc requirements, no analytics, guessing on adoption

levels.name: Basic
levels.description: Basic specs, some analytics, features tracked

enablers.name: Create spec template
enablers.description: Establish product specification template

enablers.name: Deploy analytics
enablers.description: Implement product analytics platform

enablers.name: Implement roadmap tracking
enablers.description: Set up feature roadmap tracking

levels.name: Defined
levels.description: Acceptance criteria, activation funnels, adoption tracked

enablers.name: Implement acceptance criteria process
enablers.description: Require acceptance criteria for all features

enablers.name: Instrument activation funnel
enablers.description: Track user activation journey

enablers.name: Implement NPS tracking
enablers.description: Set up NPS surveys and tracking

levels.name: Managed
levels.description: A/B testing, data-driven decisions, high activation

enablers.name: Deploy A/B testing platform
enablers.description: Implement experimentation infrastructure

enablers.name: Optimize onboarding
enablers.description: Improve activation funnel conversion

enablers.name: Retention improvement program
enablers.description: Analyze and improve retention drivers

levels.name: Optimizing
levels.description: Personalization, predictive churn, continuous discovery

enablers.name: Implement personalization
enablers.description: Personalized user experiences

ai.name: AI
ai.description: AI adoption and integration maturity across all value streams

levels.name: Reactive
levels.description: Ad-hoc AI usage, individual experiments, no governance

criteria.description: AI tool spend is tracked and visible
